job_description:
# Data Quality Analyst for Real World Evidence (Remote)
Company: Pinnacle Method Consulting
Source: LinkedIn
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-quality-analyst-for-real-world-evidence-remote-at-pinnacle-method-consulting-4360105256

- Remote data quality role in MedTech/life sciences.
- Focus on warehouse validation, lineage, traceability, and SQL reasoning.

replacements.replace: Data Quality Analyst | SQL | Data Lineage | Warehouse Validation
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and tracing enterprise data across healthcare reporting environments. Deep expertise in advanced SQL, source-to-target testing, data quality controls, and documenting lineage-aware validation needed to support trusted analytical data products.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, data lineage awareness, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage

replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules to standardize traceable validation across record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic.
replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.

replacements.replace: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—expanding readiness for modern cloud data platforms and AI-ready analytical environments.
replacements.find: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building cloud and AI-ready data pipeline competencies to extend enterprise ETL expertise into modern data stacks.

gaps: AWS Databricks lake environment not direct current production experience
Real world evidence domain is adjacent, not core
notes: Tailored toward data lineage, warehouse validation, traceability, and analytical correctness.
job_title: Data Quality Analyst for Real World Evidence (Remote)
